xml.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?> <Response> <Status>Failed</Status> <EntryNo>0</EntryNo> <ProcessStatus>Not Received</ProcessStatus> <Exception>A call to System.Xml.Schema.XmlSchemaSet.Add failed with this message: The targetNamespace parameter 'www.boltrics.nl/receivereceiptwolf:v1.00' should be the same value as the targetNamespace 'www.boltrics.nl/receivereceipt:v1.00' of the schema.</Exception> <ErrorCallStack></ErrorCallStack> <MessageID></MessageID> <MessageType></MessageType> <SourceType> </SourceType> <SourceNo></SourceNo> <DateTimeReceived></DateTimeReceived> <DateReceived></DateReceived> <TimeReceived>00:00:00</TimeReceived> <DateTimeProcessed></DateTimeProcessed> <DateProcessed></DateProcessed> <TimeProcessed>00:00:00</TimeProcessed> <Company>Transport Mervielde NV</Company> <Username>DATAHUB DYNAMICS 365 BC</Username> </Response>
